evaluators.name: Cheapest 20x30 Heavy-Duty Waterproof Tarp Added (Qty 2)
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added 2 units of the cheapest qualifying 20 ft x 30 ft heavy-duty waterproof tarp under $150 with rating ≥ 4.0 to the cart.

evaluators.name: Thickest 12x16 Fire-Retardant Tarp Under $120 Added
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the thickest qualifying 12 ft x 16 ft fire-retardant tarp under $120 to the cart.

evaluators.name: Middle-Priced Outdoor Generator Cover with Free Shipping Added
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the middle-priced cover among the three cheapest outdoor generator covers that meet the size, rating, and free-shipping criteria.

evaluators.name: Bulk Order of Three Tarp Types Added with Correct Quantities
evaluators.description: Checks whether the cart contains a 12x20 clear poly tarp (qty ≥5, under $80), a 10x10 mesh tarp (qty ≥3, $40–$70), and an 8x12 canvas tarp (qty ≥2, under $90).

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated and Cheapest UV-Resistant 16x20 Tarps Favorited
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user favorited UV-resistant 16x20 tarps under $100 with rating ≥ 4.5, including both the highest-rated and the cheapest qualifying tarps.

evaluators.name: Best-Value 48x40 Pallet Cover Pack Added
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added a 48x40 pallet cover pack (25 or 50) and chose the pack with the lowest price per cover.

evaluators.name: Custom 18x24 Blue Vinyl Tarp with Grommets Added to Cart
evaluators.description: Checks whether a custom tarp configuration for an ~18x24 blue vinyl tarp with grommets ~18 in apart and reinforced corners, quantity 3, was created and added to the cart.

evaluators.name: Checkout Started with Atlanta Address and Standard Ground Shipping
evaluators.description: Checks whether checkout is in the payment step using a new Atlanta, GA 30301 address and the 'Standard Ground (5–7 Business Days)' shipping method.
